hero.label: VIMO / VOL.01 / SS26
hero.lede: A new collectible for the riders, runners, and dreamers. Posable practice tools that live in your bag, on your desk, and in your kit. Snowboard first. Every sport next.

marquee.items: POSABLE / CARRYABLE / COLLECTIBLE / POSABLE / CARRYABLE / COLLECTIBLE /

manifesto.label: MANIFESTO
manifesto.title: We are making the figures athletes wished they had as kids.
manifesto.body1: This brand started between two snowboard cultures. One co-founder runs a snowboard guesthouse network out of Saitama, Japan — hosting riders touring the country. The other parents two competing junior snowboarders in the US. Both kept noticing the same gap. Their riders wanted something real to study with, something to carry, something to collect.
manifesto.body2: Not a screen. Not a textbook. A real, articulated, beautifully made piece that lived in their world. We are building it now — posable practice tools that are also collectibles, original characters that are also archetypes. One day, made to your face, your height, your kit. Snowboard first. Every sport next.
manifesto.body3: For the kid who taped sequences on the wall. For the rider who studies frames before they sleep. For everyone who knows that movement is a language.

characters.label: CHARACTERS / WAVE I
characters.title: We don't sell signatures. We sell archetypes.
characters.subtitle: Each character is the spirit of a discipline — never the likeness of a single athlete. Collect the series; rotate the kit; pose the moment.

powder.name: The Powder Hunter
powder.tagline: Lives where the lift line ends.

park.name: The Park Rat
park.tagline: Switch in, switch out, no flat ground.

halfpipe.name: The Halfpipe Specialist
halfpipe.tagline: Wall to wall is a whole language.

sports.label: ROADMAP
sports.title:
One brand.
Every discipline that has a culture.
sports.subtitle: The mechanism is universal. The cultures are infinite. We start where the founders breathe — and walk into every sport that has a tribe.

tech.label: TECHNOLOGY
tech.kicker: Stands in riding stance. Out of the box.
tech.title: A tendon at every knee. Neck and wrists swivel. Stands like it means it.
tech.body: VIMO Classic is built directly on the expired US6893318B2 patent (Tech Rider FLEXDOLL) construction. Knees and elbows are pre-bent into the riding stance and held by a dorsal elastic tendon — the figure stands itself the moment you open the box. The only active joints are the new ones we added in rigid plastic: a swivel neck and two swivel wrists. No posing skill required.

sizes.label: TWO SCALES
sizes.kicker: One character. Two sizes. Three jobs.
sizes.title:
The display piece,
and the one that lives in your bag.

mini.name: MINI CHARM
mini.for: Bag. Desk. Pocket. Always with you.

founders.label: FOUNDERS
founders.kicker: Two riders, two coasts, one figure.
founders.title: Built by a Saitama host and a US snowboard parent.

japan.label: JAPAN OPERATIONS
japan.name: Ryosuke Okamura
japan.bio: Saitama-based operator running a snowboard guesthouse network and an assistant service for global riders touring Japan. Plugged into the Saitama snowboard community and indoor-dome scene — brings the live feel of working Japanese riders into product development.
japan.brings: Japan distribution, direct access to working riders, product-test network.

us.label: US OPERATIONS
us.name: Francisco Rodriguez
us.bio: US-based with deep ties to snowboard shops and rider culture. Father of two competing junior snowboarders. Drives sourcing oversight, IP strategy, and US/Europe retail distribution.
us.brings: US shop network, IP strategy, athlete partnerships, manufacturer relationships.

signup.label: PRE-LAUNCH
signup.title: Get the drop alert.
signup.subtitle: First wave is limited and numbered. Sign up to get the launch link before it goes public — and the founders' letter, just for you.
signup.fine: We email twice before launch and never share your address.

news.label: DISPATCH
news.title: Notes from the studio.
news.subtitle: Slow journal. We post when something real happens — never more, never less.

pre1.title: The studio opens in Saitama.
pre1.excerpt: A Saitama-based snowboard operator and a US snowboard parent decide to make the figures their riders kept asking for.

pre2.title: Quotes requested from ten factories.
pre2.excerpt: China, Vietnam, and Hong Kong — shortlisted partners include OEMs behind Funko, Mighty Jaxx, and Superplastic.

pre3.title: Pre-launch site goes live.
pre3.excerpt: Brand HP, pre-launch teaser, and a multilingual concierge chat all up at vimo-co.vercel.app while we wait on factory quotes.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: The questions we kept getting asked.
faq.subtitle: Honest answers about a thing that doesn't exist yet.

whenLaunch.q: When does the first figure actually ship?
whenLaunch.a: We're targeting late 2026 for the first wave. Manufacturing quotes are in motion now; once we lock the factory and the character lineup, we'll announce a firm window via the drop alert list. No pretending we know the date yet.

whereBuy.q: Where will I be able to buy them?
whereBuy.a: Three channels at launch: our own webstore (worldwide shipping), selected snowboard shops in the US (through our co-founder's network) and Japan (through Quest indoor dome and partner stores), and a numbered Kickstarter pre-order wave for collectors.

license.q: Are these based on real athletes?
license.a: No. Every character is an original archetype — "The Powder Hunter", "The Park Rat", "The Halfpipe Specialist", and so on. We sidestep licensing entirely. If a real rider wants to collaborate later, that's a separate, premium drop.

moq.q: How many are you making in the first run?
moq.a: The first wave will be numbered and limited — likely 2,000 to 3,000 units of the main figure plus a separate run of the mini charm. We'd rather sell out and restock than over-produce and discount.

minicharm.q: What's the difference between the main figure and the mini charm?
minicharm.a: The main figure is VIMO Classic (12.5 cm, ~USD 60): knees and elbows are pre-bent into the riding stance and held by an elastic tendon (per the expired US6893318B2 patent), with three active swivel joints we added — neck and two wrists. Real fabric costume + real snowboard, self-standing out of the box. The mini charm (5-7 cm, ~USD 22) is a static, simplified attachable for your bag or desk. Same character, two scales.

shipping.a: Yes — designed worldwide from day one. The US and Japan are the primary launch markets, with full Europe coverage at the same time. Asia and Latin America from the Kickstarter wave onward.

press.label: PRESS / PARTNERSHIPS
press.title: Writing about us? Stocking us? Get in touch.
press.body: We send a quiet press kit before each drop — high-resolution renders, founder bios, brand story, and the technical fact sheet. If you run a shop, run a magazine, or just want to talk: we read every email.

footer.legal: © 2026 Circular House Inc. All articulations reserved.

launch.lede: A limited, numbered first run of articulated snowboarder figures. Sign up below to get the launch link, the founders' letter, and a numbered pre-order slot before the public.
launch.fine: Two emails before launch. Then your number is held for 48 hours. We never share your address.

perks.p2Title: Hand-numbered piece from the first run.
perks.p3Title: Founders' letter in the box, signed.

launch.confirmed: You're in. Wave I is reserved.
launch.confirmedBody: We'll write a few days before launch with your number and the link.

chat.greeting: Hey — I'm the VIMO concierge. Ask me about launch, sizes, shipping, or anything else.

quickPrompts.ship: Do you ship to my country?
quickPrompts.real: Are these based on real athletes?

answers.launch: Late 2026 for Wave I. Sign up to the drop alert and you'll get the exact date a few days before public.
answers.price: Main figure: about USD 60 / JPY 9,800. Mini charm: about USD 22 / JPY 3,500. Same character, two scales.
answers.ship: Yes — worldwide. The US and Japan are the primary launch markets, full Europe at the same time, Asia and LatAm from the Kickstarter wave onward.
answers.real: Each figure is an original archetype, not a real athlete. The Powder Hunter, the Park Rat, the Halfpipe Specialist… you get the idea. Athlete collaborations may come later as premium drops.
answers.fallback: Good question — easiest is to drop us an email at hello@circularhouse.example and we'll get back fast. Or sign up to the drop alert to get the deeper answers in our pre-launch letters.
